etymology.description: 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") + 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") = duplication of jade -> stylized as 王
etymology.interpretation: The character 玨(玨) (jué, "strings of jade") represents the notion of multiple pieces of jade used together, which is visually depicted by the duplication of the 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") character, stylized as a 王-like symbol.
